body.title: Test/verify kindlekey+mobidedrm pipeline for Kindle books; Playwright+OCR as fallback
body.result: Python 3 port complete: aescbc, kindlekey, k4mobidedrm, kgenpids, mobidedrm, alfcrypto all converted (raise X,msg → X(msg); except X,e: → X as e:; has_key → in; print stmts; ur-strings; htmlentitydefs). Pipeline runs without crash. NOKEY on Linux = expected (no desktop Kindle app to extract keys). Playwright+OCR fallback: separate ticket needed.
